id.description: An identifier for the pipeline. Pipeline IDs must begin with a letter or underscore and contain only letters, underscores, dashes, hyphens and numbers.

pipeline.workers.description: The number of workers that will, in parallel, execute the filter and output stages of the pipeline.

pipeline.batch.size.description: The maximum number of events an individual worker thread will collect from inputs before attempting to execute its filters and outputs.

pipeline.batch.delay.description: When creating pipeline event batches, how long in milliseconds to wait for each event before dispatching an undersized batch to pipeline workers.

queue.type.description: The internal queuing model to use for event buffering.

queue.max_bytes.description: The total capacity of the queue (`queue.type: persisted`) in number of bytes.

queue.checkpoint.writes.description: The maximum number of written events before forcing a checkpoint when persistent queues are enabled (`queue.type: persisted`).

description.description: A description of the pipeline. This description is not used by Elasticsearch or Logstash.

last_modified.description: The date the pipeline was last updated. It must be in the `yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZZ` strict_date_time format.

pipeline_metadata.description: Optional metadata about the pipeline, which can have any contents. This metadata is not generated or used by Elasticsearch or Logstash.

pipeline_settings.description: Settings for the pipeline. It supports only flat keys in dot notation.

username.description: The user who last updated the pipeline.
